summary: YoY (Year-over-Year) Comparison Tab - FULLY WORKING. Backend: 18/19 pytest tests passed (1 timeout due to slow external DB). Frontend: All YoY tab components verified - KPIs, monthly table, classification mix, and 2-level drill-down working correctly.

minor.issue: Intermittent timeout (>60s) due to slow external Odoo database. Not a code issue.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> inside <span>. Console warning only, does not affect functionality.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/metrics requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/metrics returns year_a, year_b, delta with ventas/unidades/compras
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/metrics default years are current and previous year
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-month requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-month returns months array with data
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-month months are valid (1-12)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-month from_month/to_month filters work
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-item requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-item returns rows with marca/tipo/entalle/tela and ventas_a/ventas_b/var_abs/var_pct
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-item top=5 parameter limits results
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-item sort_by=ventas_a sort_dir=desc works
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-item sort_by=var_abs sort_dir=desc works
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/by-item sort_dir=asc ascending sort works
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/item-orders requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/item-orders returns orders with order_id/order_name/date_order/qty_item/ventas_item/lines_count
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/item-orders with specific filters (marca/tipo/entalle/tela) works
Backend: GET /api/cuentas/8/ventas/yoy/item-orders pagination works
Backend: var_pct calculation is correct: (ventas_a - ventas_b) / ventas_b * 100
Frontend: YoY tab renders with data-testid='yoy-tab'
Frontend: YoY controls section (year selectors, month filters, apply button) present
Frontend: KPI cards show ventas, unidades, compras comparison (S/ 129,719 vs S/ 840,556 = -84.6%)
Frontend: Monthly table shows 12 months with variation percentages
Frontend: Mix table shows 111 classification items with color-coded variations
Frontend: Click on mix item opens drill-down drawer with 50 orders
Frontend: Click on order in drawer shows line details (Level 2) with Modelo, Talla, Color, Qty, P.Unit, Subtotal
Frontend: Back button in Level 2 works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 1101-1323: YoY endpoints use _YOY_BASE template with CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_order) for year comparison
server.py: _yoy_month_extra() helper handles from_month/to_month filters correctly
server.py: var_pct calculated in Python loop after query for accurate percentage
server.py: item-orders endpoint correctly handles empty classification strings with COALESCE
YoYTab.jsx: Self-contained component with proper state management for metrics, months, items
YoYTab.jsx: YoYOrdersDrawer component handles 2-level drill-down (orders -> order lines)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data from external Odoo database
context_for_next_testing_agent: YoY comparison tab verified. Backend endpoints: GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/yoy/metrics (KPIs), GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/yoy/by-month (monthly breakdown), GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/yoy/by-item (classification mix with sort_by/sort_dir params), GET /api/cuentas/{id}/ventas/yoy/item-orders (drill-down orders by classification). Frontend: YoYTab.jsx component in CuentaDetalle.jsx (tab-yoy). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_yoy_endpoints.py. Note: External Odoo DB queries can be slow (30-60s) for large accounts.
